Welcome

Make yourself at home.

Welcome to Lemnos — one of the most authentic and peaceful islands in the Aegean. This guide is a collection of our favorite places, beaches, tavernas, sunsets, and small local tips to help you enjoy the island as we do: slowly, simply, and close to nature.

About Lemnos

An island that reveals itself slowly.

Island Overview

Lemnos is one of the most authentic and understated islands in Greece, located in the northern Aegean Sea. The island combines sandy beaches, traditional villages, volcanic landscapes, and a strong culinary identity.

What makes it unique

    Lemnos is an island that reveals itself slowly.

    The Villa

    Villa Laguna

    A traditional stone house in the peaceful village of Palio Pedino. Built with local stone and surrounded by nature, it combines authentic island architecture with modern comfort.

    Atmosphere & Style

    Natural stone walls, warm colors, wooden details, and traditional architectural elements create a cozy and welcoming environment.

    Amenities

      House Rules

        Practical Information

        Getting your bearings

        Villa Laguna is located approximately 10–15 minutes from Lemnos International Airport and 15–20 minutes from Myrina port.

        Emergency Numbers

        European Emergency112
        Hospital of Lemnos+30 22543 50400
        Police+30 22540 22200

          Where to Eat

          Tavernas we love.

          A short drive in any direction brings you to remarkable tables. These are the four we'd send our closest friends to first — from a hidden gem in the village next door to a sea-view fish taverna in Moudros.

          Until Next Time

          Safe travels.

          Thank you for sharing this special corner of the Aegean with us. We hope Lemnos leaves you with beautiful memories, slow mornings, and the desire to return again. Safe travels — and we hope to welcome you back soon.

          — Konstantinos & Eleni
